get.description:
Query parameters:

- `includes[]=alerts` default unset. In the current version, `alerts` value is still included to prevent errors in production. Later, it will be removed.

- `includes[]=summary` default unset.

- `isDetectedOnly` default `false`.

post.summary: Path Discovery - Trigger (when never run, failed, or completed)
post.description:
Triggering path discovery can be done when: 

- `pathDiscoveryEntry` = null
- OR `pathDiscoveryEntry.scanStatus` = "completed"
- OR `pathDiscoveryEntry.scanStatus` = "failed"

post.summary: Entry - Update an entry with new file

get.summary: News - Check connection of news service

get.description:
# Parametes

- `keywords[]` optional. It is used to add keywords other than predefined team keywords from the system.
- `search` optional. This will find news with similar search string on news `title` or `snippet`.

post.description:
Body parameters:

- type: email, telegram, webhook, slack
    
- name: string
    
- config:
    
    - address (type = email)
        
    - chatId (type = telegram)
        
    - url (type = webhook)
        
    - channel (type = slack)
        
- isEnabled: boolean (optional)

get.description:
List all notification channels in a team.

Query parameters:

- limit: number
    
- offset: number
    
- order: asc, desc
    
- sort: createdOn, updatedOn, type, name, isEnabled
    
- type: email, telegram, webhook, slack
    
- isEnabled: boolean
